name: HSR Bunny Club
description:
Legend has it that in some remote corner of the galaxy there exists a club filled with only the tallest and most beautiful women. It is also said that they will fulfill the desires of anyone lucky enough to stumble upon their paradise among the stars. Minor rework to the intro message so they don't all come at you at once. Artist: ElisKalti https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/8350098
